name: Hartshorn German Christmas Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Obtain Hartshorn from your pharmacy; it is ammonium crystals.
2. Mix sugar, salt, shortening, eggs, and milk in one bowl until combined.
3. In a separate bowl, dissolve the Hartshorn in boiling water until completely dissolved.
4. Add vanilla extract and anise seeds to the sugar mixture.
5. Combine the Hartshorn mixture with the sugar mixture.
6. Gradually add flour to the sugar mixture until stiff enough not to be sticky (it may require 4-5 pounds).
7. Roll out dough on a floured surface and cut into desired shapes using cookie cutters.
8. Bake immediately in a moderate oven (325°F to 350°F) for 10-15 minutes.
This entire recipe will make between 180-220 cookies. For half the recipe, up to 100 cookies are suggested, but they are great!
